Ad Text:
The Opportunity

This is an opportunity to step into a senior advisory leadership role within the Department of Education, working on complex, high-impact initiatives that improve how the system operates and delivers outcomes.

As Director, Business Solutions and Advice, you will lead a small, capable team delivering financial insight, business improvement and strategic advisory services across the Department. The work is varied, often ambiguous and requires both structured thinking and practical delivery.

What You’ll Be Doing

·         Leading advisory engagements from problem definition through to implementation

·         Partnering with senior stakeholders to assess performance and identify opportunities

·         Overseeing financial analysis, modelling and reporting

·         Managing multiple workstreams and delivering high-quality outcomes

·         Building team capability and fostering a collaborative, high-performing environment

What You Bring

·         Experience in consulting, advisory, audit or business improvement

·         Strong stakeholder engagement and influencing capability

·         Ability to operate in complex environments with competing priorities

·         A track record of delivering practical outcomes

·         Leadership experience, including developing teams

·         Government experience is valued but not essential.




Why This Role

·         Work on meaningful challenges within a purpose-driven organisation

·         Influence decision making at a senior level

·         See work through to implementation and impact

·         Gain exposure across a large and complex system

How to Apply

To be considered, please submit:

A current resume

A cover letter outlining your experience against the core competencies and responsibilities detailed in the position description

For a confidential discussion, contact:

Ashleigh McMillan | 07 3305 5800 or email a.mcmillan@ontalent.com.au

We are committed to an inclusive recruitment process and welcome applications from diverse backgrounds.

Applications Close 17th May

Help shape what’s next in data, AI, and advisory within Altis Consulting.   We’re looking for a Principal Consultant to join the team and play a key role in building our Victorian success.  

This is more than a delivery role. We’re looking for someone who can bring strong technical capability, commercial thinking, and a modern advisory mindset to help clients solve real business problems with data. 

Join a growing team that values curiosity, collaboration, and practical innovation. You will be someone who is excited by evolving technology, comfortable navigating ambiguity, and motivated by creating solutions that are not only clever, but sustainable, governed, and valuable in the real world. 

In this role 

You will work closely with clients to understand their challenges, shape solutions, and deliver high-impact outcomes across modern data platforms and AI-enabled environments. 

Your role will include: 

Lead the design and delivery of modern data and analytics solutions 
Partner with clients to translate business problems into practical, scalable strategies 
Provide trusted advisory support, recommendations, and technical leadership 
Work across platforms such as Snowflake, Databricks, and Microsoft Fabric 
Support the development of governed, sustainable, and future-ready data solutions 
Mentor other team members, share expertise, and help foster a high-performing, collaborative team environment  
Engage confidently with stakeholders across both technical and non-technical backgrounds  

What you will bring 

We’re looking for someone who combines strong foundational skills with a modern mindset. 

Lets talk experience 

You will bring experience in consulting, advisory, or client-facing delivery roles within data and analytics (No specific industry) 
Strong capability across modern data platforms, particularly Snowflake (essential), Databricks, and/or Fabric (desirable) 
Apply strong data engineering and data modelling capability to build scalable, sustainable, and well-governed solutions that turn complex data into practical business value 
Exposure to AI- solutions, or a clear understanding of how AI can be applied responsibly in enterprise environments, is a bonus.  
The ability to solve real-world business challenges, not just build technical outputs 
Confidence in making recommendations, influencing stakeholders, and leading conversations with clients 
A strong understanding of how to deliver solutions that are scalable, practical, and well governed

Added Bonus 

Previous exposure to modern AI-assisted delivery tools (GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, Cursor, Snowflake Cortex Code or similar) and the judgment to use them responsibly to accelerate delivery while maintaining quality. 

The mindset that matters 

Technical capability is important, but it’s only part of the picture. 

We’re especially interested in people who demonstrate: 

A growth mindset 
Curiosity and a genuine interest in new and emerging technologies 
Resilience and adaptability in changing environments 
Strong collaboration and communication skills 
The confidence to challenge thinking, offer insight, and add value beyond delivery 
A practical, solutions-focused approach 

What’s in it for you 

Meaningful work within data, AI, and business advisory 
The chance to help shape client outcomes, team culture, and market presence 
A collaborative environment that values innovation, learning, and impact 
The opportunity to work with modern platforms and forward-thinking clients 

Your Next Chapter Starts Here

At Altis, we offer more than a job. We offer a career opportunity. You’ll have the tools, resources, and support to build your career, take on interesting projects, and work on challenging problems that make a real impact.

We are high performers who support each other to succeed. Our culture encourages bringing your whole self to work, embracing continuous learning, and fostering growth through diverse, complex projects. You’ll be part of a collaborative, inclusive environment where curiosity is valued, ideas are encouraged, and your contribution matters.


How We Invest in You:

A career pathway with ongoing learning and development
Exposure to varied and challenging projects across industries
A supportive, inclusive culture that values diversity and individuality
Hybrid working model
Competitive salary
A holistic health and wellness program that supports you and your family
Paid parental leave
Reward and recognition program

Let’s Start the Conversation

Apply now! We’d love to hear from you.

At Altis, Seeing Your Career Differently means creating an environment where respect, fairness, growth, and well-being are at the core of how we work. We welcome and celebrate people from all backgrounds, experiences, identities, abilities, and thinking styles, and we are committed to providing equal opportunities for all qualified applicants.

If you require adjustments or support during the application process, please let us know. We are here to ensure you can bring your best self to every stage.

Why SoftwareOne?

SoftwareOne and Crayon have come together to form a global, AI-powered software and cloud solutions provider with a bold vision for the future. With a footprint in over 70 countries and a diverse team of 13,000+ professionals, we offer unparalleled opportunities for talent to grow, make an impact, and shape the future of technology. At the heart of our business is our people. We empower our teams to work across borders, innovate fearlessly, and continuously develop their skills through world-class learning and development programs. Whether you're passionate about cloud, software, data, AI, or building meaningful client relationships, you’ll find a place to thrive here. Join us and be part of a purpose-driven culture where your ideas matter, your growth is supported, and your career can go global. 


The role

Passionate about leading high‑impact machine learning initiatives and delivering scalable, production‑ready AI solutions?

Motivated to mentor and grow a team of ML and data engineers while remaining hands‑on with advanced model development and deployment?

Inspired to join a collaborative Data & AI organisation that values innovation, technical excellence, and continuous learning?

As our new Machine Learning Engineer – Team Lead, you will play a pivotal role in leading the design and delivery of machine learning solutions end‑to‑end, while providing technical leadership and mentorship to a small, high‑performing engineering team. You will bridge business objectives with advanced ML techniques, guide architectural decisions, and ensure models are production‑ready, scalable, and continuously improved.

Key responsibilities will include:

Lead and mentor a team of ML and Data Engineers, providing technical guidance, regular feedback, and supporting professional development.
Own the end‑to‑end lifecycle of machine learning initiatives, translating business requirements into well‑defined ML problem statements, technical solutions, and delivery plans.
Design, build, train, and evaluate advanced machine learning models, and contribute to architectural decisions for scalable ML pipelines and cloud‑based deployments (Azure preferred).
Partner with MLOps and DevOps teams to implement CI/CD pipelines, model versioning, monitoring, retraining, and production support best practices.
Collaborate cross‑functionally with Data Engineering, Software Development, Sales & Pre‑Sales, and leadership stakeholders, while staying current with emerging ML technologies and driving adoption where valuable.

What we need to see from you
Proven experience delivering machine learning solutions into production environments.
Strong technical expertise in Python and ML frameworks such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, and Scikit‑learn.
Solid understanding of end‑to‑end ML pipelines, data preprocessing, feature engineering, model evaluation, and monitoring.
Experience working with cloud platforms (Azure preferred), Docker, Kubernetes, and MLOps tooling (e.g., MLflow, Airflow).
Ability to balance technical depth with leadership responsibilities and commercial awareness and having experience working within agile delivery environments and across multiple stakeholder groups

Job Function

Software & Cloud
